message:
feat(ops): add accessibility and theme modules, extend analytics and index screens

lib.rs: add public accessibility and theme modules with re-exports of
FrameQualityTracker, FrameTimeBudget, KeyboardParityAudit (accessibility)
and SemanticPalette, ThemeVariant, FocusIndicatorSpec (theme). These
provide the foundation for WCAG-compliant TUI rendering.

accessibility.rs: new module implementing frame quality tracking, time
budget management, and keyboard navigation parity auditing for
screen-reader compatibility.

theme.rs: new module defining semantic color palettes, theme variants
(light/dark/high-contrast), and focus indicator specifications.

historical_analytics.rs (+149 lines): add SnapshotExportMode
(Compact/Full) enum and SnapshotExportPayload struct for exporting
analytics snapshots in machine-readable formats.

index_resources.rs (+101 lines): extend the index resources screen
with additional resource monitoring and status display capabilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
